# EstatePlus (Estate Plus)
> A modern real-estate CRM and operating ecosystem for brokers, builders, channel partners and enterprises.

## About
EstatePlus is a cloud-based platform that centralizes lead management, inventory tracking, attendance monitoring, site visit logging, and marketing automation for real estate businesses in India.

## Features
- CRM & Lead Management: Capture, qualify, assign, and track leads through every stage.
- Inventory Management: Organize projects, units, and availability in real time.
- Marketing Integration: Run Meta campaigns and sync leads directly into the CRM.
- Automation Systems: Workflows for follow-ups, assignment, and notifications.
- Reporting Dashboards: Live visibility into pipeline, team, and revenue health.
- Team Coordination: Multi-user roles, permissions, and shared inventory.
- Attendance & Site Visits: GPS-based attendance logging and site visit tracking.
- Broker Management: Coordinate broker networks and distribute leads efficiently.

## Plans
- Estate Plus Core: CRM & Operational Management Suite (from ₹24,000/quarter).
- Estate Plus GrowthX: CRM + Performance Marketing Ecosystem (from ₹64,000/quarter).

## Contact
- Email: growth@estatepluscrm.in
- Website: https://estatepluscrm.in
- Location: India
